frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: These days boys' parents also have to be very careful before fixing marriage. One problem comes, immediately 498A, maintenance, alimony — everything becomes one-sided, and the girl will walk away with money also. I keep telling my nephews, don't get carried away by these modern girls talking about independence; many are only looking for a settled man and legal backup.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative and presents marriage law as a tool women use against men. It encodes the '498A misuse' trope, victimhood inversion, and suspicion that modern women pursue marriage mainly for money and legal leverage.
original_frame: Motherhood as Basis of Respect, Women Defined by Male Relations
persona_text: You are Kavitha. Age 62. A woman in Chennai. You are at a family gathering where you are meeting various relatives. You are introduced to a young woman named Divya who is 29, unmarried, works at an MNC, and seems confident and happy. After Divya moves away you are talking to the relative who introduced her. You are giving your assessment of Divya and in the course of your assessment you reveal that you cannot fully respect or relate to a young woman who is 29, unmarried, and seemingly unbothered by it, and what you think her life is missing and what will happen to her later.
